topics.name: 100–200 Level: Programming Fundamentals and Computer Organisation (UNEC Campus)
topics.description: COS 101 Introduction to Computing, COS 211 Programming I, COS 221 Computer Organisation.

subtopics.name: COS 101 & COS 211: Introduction to Computing and Structured Programming (UNEC)
objectives: Describe the history and applications of computing at UNEC Enugu campus
Write, test, and debug structured programs in Python/C solving mathematical and text-processing problems

subtopics.name: COS 221: Computer Architecture and Number Systems
objectives: Convert between binary, octal, hexadecimal, and decimal number systems
Explain CPU architecture, instruction set, memory hierarchy, and I/O subsystems

topics.name: 300 Level: Data Structures, Operating Systems, Databases & Computer Networks
topics.description: COS 301 Data Structures, COS 311 Operating Systems, COS 321 Database Systems, COS 331 Networks.

subtopics.name: COS 301 & COS 311: Data Structures and OS at UNEC
objectives: Implement arrays, linked lists, trees, heaps, and graph algorithms in C/Java/Python
Explain process management, scheduling algorithms, virtual memory, and file system organisation

subtopics.name: COS 321 & COS 331: DBMS and Computer Networking
objectives: Design normalised relational databases and write complex SQL queries including joins and subqueries
Describe OSI and TCP/IP models, routing protocols, and network security fundamentals

topics.name: 400 Level: Software Engineering, AI, Cybersecurity & Final Project
topics.description: COS 401 Software Engineering, COS 411 Artificial Intelligence, COS 421 Cybersecurity, COS 499 Project.

subtopics.name: COS 401 & COS 421: Software Engineering and Cybersecurity
objectives: Apply software development methodologies and UML modelling to design large-scale systems
Identify common security vulnerabilities (SQL injection, XSS, buffer overflow) and mitigation strategies

subtopics.name: COS 499: UNEC Computer Science Research Project
objectives: Design and implement an original software system or conduct formal computer science research
Present project report and defend before UNN (Enugu Campus) Department of Computer Science examiners
